metadata.scheme_name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender

raw_data.details: The "Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender" scheme was introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Rajasthan. It aims to support transgender students pursuing post-matric education. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹1,000 to cover educational expenses for their post-matric studies.
raw_data.benefits: Post-Matric Scholarship:Scholarship @ ₹1,000 per month per student for 10 months. NOTE: The scholarship amount is directly transferred to the beneficiary's bank account.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant should be a resident of Rajasthan. The applicant should belong to the transgender community. The applicant should be studying at the post-matric level. The applicant should be enrolled in a recognized school/college in Rajasthan. The applicant’s family annual income should not exceed ₹8,00,000.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineApplication Submission:The applicant/parents/guardians must fill out the scholarship application form and attach the required documents. Submit the complete application form to their school principal/institution. Institutional Verification:The school principal/institution verifies the application and forwards it to the Social Justice and Empowerment Department's district office. Approval Process:The district office verifies the documents and approves/rejects the application within one month. Disbursement:Upon approval, the scholarship amount is transferred to the applicant's bank account.
raw_data.documents_required: Transgender Identity CertificateCertificate of Enrollment in a Recognized Institution/SchoolPrevious Year’s Mark Sheet Aadhaar Card Parents/Guardians Income Certificate Domicile Certificate/Ration Card/Voter IDBank Passbook CopyAny other documents as required

To know more please visit Check EligibilityTransgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying TransgenderRajasthanTransgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying TransgenderPost-matricScholarshipStudentTransgenderCheck EligibilityDetailsThe "Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender" scheme was introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Rajasthan. It aims to support transgender students pursuing post-matric education. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹1,000 to cover educational expenses for their post-matric studies. BenefitsPost-Matric Scholarship:Scholarship @ ₹1,000 per month per student for 10 months. NOTE: The scholarship amount is directly transferred to the beneficiary's bank account. EligibilityThe applicant should be a resident of Rajasthan. The applicant should belong to the transgender community. The applicant should be studying at the post-matric level. The applicant should be enrolled in a recognized school/college in Rajasthan. The applicant’s family annual income should not exceed ₹8,00,000. Application ProcessOfflineApplication Submission:The applicant/parents/guardians must fill out the scholarship application form and attach the required documents. Submit the complete application form to their school principal/institution. Institutional Verification:The school principal/institution verifies the application and forwards it to the Social Justice and Empowerment Department's district office. Approval Process:The district office verifies the documents and approves/rejects the application within one month. Disbursement:Upon approval, the scholarship amount is transferred to the applicant's bank account. Documents RequiredTransgender Identity CertificateCertificate of Enrollment in a Recognized Institution/SchoolPrevious Year’s Mark Sheet Aadhaar Card Parents/Guardians Income Certificate Domicile Certificate/Ration Card/Voter IDBank Passbook CopyAny other documents as requiredFrequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible for this scholarship? Transgender students who are residents of Rajasthan and enrolled in post-matric education. What is the financial assistance provided? A monthly scholarship of ₹1,000 for 10 months. Can students from other states apply? No, only residents of Rajasthan are eligible. How is the scholarship amount disbursed? Through Direct Bank Transfer (DBT) to the applicant's account. Is this scholarship available for all courses? Yes, as long as the course is post-matric and recognized. Can students apply online? Currently, the application process is offline through the school/institution. When will I receive the scholarship amount? Within one month of application approval. Is there any reservation or preference? No specific reservations, but all eligible transgender students are encouraged to apply. How can I apply for the scholarship? Submit the application to your institution, which will forward it to the district office. What documents are required for the application? Transgender Identity Card, enrollment certificate, previous year marksheet, Aadhaar card, income certificate, domicile proof, and bank details. Can the scholarship be renewed annually? Yes, subject to continued eligibility and academic progress. Sources And References[Guidelines](https://sje.rajasthan.gov.in/siteadmin/Uploads/202110051259226370.pdf)

raw_data.scheme_name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scholarship?
faqs.answer: Transgender students who are residents of Rajasthan and enrolled in post-matric education.

faqs.question: What is the financial assistance provided?
faqs.answer: A monthly scholarship of ₹1,000 for 10 months.

faqs.question: Can students from other states apply?
faqs.answer: No, only residents of Rajasthan are eligible.

faqs.question: How is the scholarship amount disbursed?
faqs.answer: Through Direct Bank Transfer (DBT) to the applicant's account.

faqs.question: Is this scholarship available for all courses?
faqs.answer: Yes, as long as the course is post-matric and recognized.

faqs.question: Can students apply online?
faqs.answer: Currently, the application process is offline through the school/institution.

faqs.question: When will I receive the scholarship amount?
faqs.answer: Within one month of application approval.

faqs.question: Is there any reservation or preference?
faqs.answer: No specific reservations, but all eligible transgender students are encouraged to apply.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the scholarship?
faqs.answer: Submit the application to your institution, which will forward it to the district office.

faqs.question: What documents are required for the application?
faqs.answer: Transgender Identity Card, enrollment certificate, previous year marksheet, Aadhaar card, income certificate, domicile proof, and bank details.

faqs.question: Can the scholarship be renewed annually?
faqs.answer: Yes, subject to continued eligibility and academic progress.
